COMPANY OVERVIEW
Zyro Dynamics Pvt. Ltd. is a product-based enterprise software company headquartered in the United States. 
Founded in 2014 by Lamine Yamal and Aitana Bonmati, the company was built on a
single conviction: that organisations of all sizes deserved intelligent, intuitive software that could grow with them.
What started as a 12-person startup building HR automation tools has grown into a 4,500-strong company with a
presence across India, the Middle East, and North America.

What started as a 12-person startup building HR automation tools has grown into a 4,500-strong company with a
presence across India, the Middle East, and North America.
The company's name is inspired by Zyro, a symbol of innovation and dynamic growth. It reflects the
company's ambition to be a guiding light in enterprise technology, and its commitment to helping organisations
navigate complexity with clarity and confidence.
Zyro Dynamics operates exclusively in the B2B SaaS segment, serving mid-sized and large enterprises across

navigate complexity with clarity and confidence.
Zyro Dynamics operates exclusively in the B2B SaaS segment, serving mid-sized and large enterprises across
industries including financial services, healthcare, manufacturing, and professional services. As of April 2025, the
company's products are used by over 1,200 enterprise clients across 28 countries.

INTRODUCTION
Welcome to Acrux Dynamics Pvt. Ltd. We are delighted to have you as part of our team and hope that your
journey here will be rewarding, fulfilling, and full of growth.
Acrux Dynamics is a product-based software company headquartered in HITEC City, Hyderabad. Founded in
2014 by Lamine Yamal and Aitana Bonmati, we have grown from a 12-person startup to over 4,500 employees
across India, the Middle East, and North America. Our flagship products, AcruxHR, AcruxCRM, AcruxInsight, and

2014 by Lamine Yamal and Aitana Bonmati, we have grown from a 12-person startup to over 4,500 employees
across India, the Middle East, and North America. Our flagship products, AcruxHR, AcruxCRM, AcruxInsight, and
AcruxDesk, are trusted by enterprise clients across the United States, the United Kingdom, the Middle East, and
Southeast Asia.
This Employee Handbook is your first point of reference for understanding the policies, practices, and culture at
Acrux Dynamics. Please read it thoroughly and keep it handy. For any queries, the HR team is always available

We value the importance of finding a healthy balance between your professional and personal life, and we
encourage you to make use of the leave entitlements available to you. We also recognise that emergencies and
illness can arise without notice, and we fully understand and support that. At the same time, we request that you
plan your leave thoughtfully and, where possible, align it with the operational needs of your team. The Company
reserves the right to revise leave rules from time to time at its discretion.

MATERNITY AND PATERNITY LEAVE
Maternity Leave
Female employees who have completed a minimum of 80 days of service in the 12 months preceding the
expected date of delivery are entitled to 26 weeks of paid Maternity Leave, in accordance with the Maternity
Benefit (Amendment) Act, 2017. This entitlement applies to the first two live births. For a third child, the
entitlement is 12 weeks. Up to 8 weeks of pre-natal leave may be availed prior to the expected delivery date.
Provisions for surrogacy and adoption are handled on a case-by-case basis. Please contact the HR team for
details.

Paternity Leave
Male employees and same-sex partners are entitled to 10 consecutive days of paid Paternity Leave, to be availed
within 90 days of the birth or legal adoption of a child. This is a one-time entitlement per child and cannot be split.

BEREAVEMENT AND MARRIAGE LEAVE
Bereavement Leave
Employees are entitled to 5 days of paid Bereavement Leave in the event of the death of an immediate family
member. For this purpose, immediate family is defined as the employee's spouse, children, parents,
parents-in-law, and siblings. Supporting documentation such as a death certificate may be requested by HR.

Marriage Leave
A one-time entitlement of 3 consecutive paid days is available for an employee's own marriage. This leave must
be applied at least 2 weeks in advance and is available only once during the entire period of employment at Zyro
Dynamics.

COMPENSATORY OFF (CO)
Employees who are required to work on a declared public holiday or on a Sunday due to a business requirement
will be entitled to a Compensatory Off day. The CO must be availed within 60 calendar days of the date it was
earned. CO days that are not availed within this window will lapse automatically. A maximum of 7 CO days may
be accumulated at any time.

LEAVE APPLICATION PROCESS
All leave must be applied for through the ZyroHR portal prior to the leave date wherever possible. For unplanned
absences such as Sick Leave or emergency Casual Leave, the application must be submitted on the same day of
absence or the next working day at the latest. The reporting manager is required to review and action leave
requests within one working day. Approved leave is automatically updated in the employee's leave balance

PERFORMANCE IMPROVEMENT PLAN (PIP)
An employee who receives a rating of 1 or 2 in two consecutive review cycles will be placed on a formal
Performance Improvement Plan. The PIP is a structured and time-bound programme aimed at giving the
employee a fair opportunity to improve.
PIP Structure
 Duration: 60 to 90 days, as determined by the reporting manager and HR Business Partner.
 At the start of the PIP, specific, measurable, and time-bound improvement targets are agreed and
documented.
